name: codex-usage-dashboard
description: Local monthly and 5-hour window usage visualization for Codex.

codexUsageDashboard.defaultMonthlyLimit.description: Default monthly usage limit for the local Codex usage dashboard.

codexUsageDashboard.defaultFiveHourLimit.description: Default 5-hour usage limit for the local Codex usage dashboard.

codexUsageDashboard.autoReadCodexSession.description: Automatically read Codex rate-limit snapshots from local session rollout files under CODEX_HOME/sessions. This does not read auth tokens.

enumDescriptions: Try the authenticated endpoint when enabled, then session files, then manual counters.
Read local Codex session rollout files only.
Use the authenticated usage endpoint only. Requires experimentalReadAuthJson.
codexUsageDashboard.dataSource.description: Usage data source for the dashboard.

codexUsageDashboard.experimentalReadAuth.description: Opt in to read CODEX_HOME/auth.json and call ChatGPT's usage endpoint. This is undocumented and may break. Tokens are not logged or stored by this extension.

codexUsageDashboard.usageEndpointUrl.description: Experimental authenticated Codex usage endpoint. Only used when endpoint mode is enabled.

codexUsageDashboard.refreshIntervalSecon.description: Auto-refresh interval for the dashboard data sources.

codexUsageDashboard.codexHome.description: Optional Codex home directory override. Leave empty to use CODEX_HOME or ~/.codex.

codexUsageDashboard.lookbackDays.description: Number of recent days to scan for Codex rollout files.
